1.1.0.0.added: Debugger will display the name given to the behaviour.

1.1.1.0.added:
- Fix bug thatcan make "On death" trigger twice for a single lethal hit
- Create Guide

1.2.0.0.added:
- Add Temporary Health Pools support.
- Set custom Absorption rates for Health & Temporary Health.
- Temporary Health (Absorption Rate / Decay Rate)

1.2.0.2.added: - Damage priority for Temporary Health : A number assigned to each pool. Pools are consumed in ascending order (lowest number first). Default is `0`. Equal-priority pools are consumed in creation order.
